parameters.query:
-- Check emergency state and bid lock
SELECT
  (SELECT is_active FROM emergency_state WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY activated_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS emergency_active,
  (SELECT locked_by FROM workflow_locks WHERE lock_name = 'bid_change' AND expires_at > NOW()) AS bid_lock_holder;

-- Acquire lock for budget pacer
INSERT INTO workflow_locks (lock_name, locked_by, locked_at, expires_at)
VALUES ('bid_change', 'budget_pacer', NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
ON CONFLICT (lock_name) DO UPDATE
  SET locked_by = 'budget_pacer', locked_at = NOW(), expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes'
  WHERE workflow_locks.expires_at < NOW() OR workflow_locks.locked_by = 'budget_pacer';
SELECT country_code, max_cpl, min_bid, max_bid FROM geo_payouts WHERE is_active = TRUE

SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads
FROM leads
WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
  AND created_at >= CURDATE()
GROUP BY param5

UPDATE teasers SET state = 'paused_budget', state_changed_at = NOW(), state_reason = '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 200) }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE ad_id = {{ $json.ad_id }};
INSERT INTO teaser_state_log (ad_id, old_state, new_state, reason, triggered_by) VALUES ({{ $json.ad_id }}, 'active', 'paused_budget', '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 200) }}', 'budget_pacer');

INSERT INTO bid_history (ad_id, old_bid, new_bid, reason, rule_applied) VALUES ({{ $json.ad_id }}, {{ $json.current_bid }}, {{ $json.new_bid }}, '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 200) }}', 'budget_pacer');
DELETE FROM workflow_locks WHERE lock_name = 'bid_change' AND locked_by = 'budget_pacer';
